name: Cocoa butter
description: Cocoa butter is edible vegetable fat extracted from the cocoa bean that is a rich source of saturated fatty acids. It is also referred to as theobroma oil as it is extracted from the Theobroma cocoa seeds. Cocoa butter contains 33% oleic acid, 25% palmitic acid, and 33% stearic acid but does not contain caffeine or theobromine. Cocoa butter is used to make chocolate, as well as some ointments, toiletries, and pharmaceuticals. It is avavilable in numerous forms of OTC products, such as lotions, creams, bars and suppositories.
